summary: Frontend-only regression test of the onboarding-coach chat-bubble fix (setTimeout wrap around emitAction). Verified on live preview URL as pro@axiom.ai. All 4 scenarios PASSED.

test_results.scenario: Dashboard greeting bubble appears for 231 LLC (onboarding_complete=false)
test_results.evidence: AiPanel rendered chat bubble text starting with 'Welcome — **231 LLC** still needs a quick onboarding to get its books ready...' after switching to 231 LLC via the header company switcher. Confirmed in DOM via evaluate() and screenshot.
Class list for the Welcome bubble is 'max-w-[92%] rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm whitespace-pre-wrap leading-relaxed chat-bubble-ai ai-shimmer-bubble' — .closest('.ai-shimmer-bubble') returned true.

test_results.scenario: Typing 'yes' in AI input triggers reply and navigates to /onboarding
test_results.evidence: After sending 'yes', an assistant bubble 'Great — heading to onboarding now.' appeared and URL navigated to /onboarding within ~1s.

test_results.scenario: Onboarding /onboarding step-1 greeting bubble also appears (regression)
test_results.evidence: Bubble 'Great, 231 LLC let's set up your books together. First — tell me what kind of business this is...' rendered in AiPanel on /onboarding.

critical_code_review_comments: OnboardingNudge uses setTimeout(500) as a workaround for a mount-order race between the emitter (Dashboard/Onboarding) and the AiPanel listener. Works today, but is timing-dependent. Consider a small event-bus buffer (replay last N unhandled actions to newly registered listeners) or a mounted-flag/ready-signal so AiPanel pulls the pending greet on register — would eliminate the race without arbitrary delays.
Same setTimeout duplication exists in Dashboard.jsx and Onboarding.jsx — extract a helper (e.g. emitActionDeferred / emitAfterMount) to DRY the pattern.
test_credentials: pro@axiom.ai / pro123 (present in /app/memory/test_credentials.md scope). Target company: 231 LLC (Consulting, Onboarding badge, onboarding_complete=false).
seed_data_creation: None — 231 LLC already existed with onboarding_complete=false.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login lands at /pro/clients. Do NOT click 'Open books' card button to select 231 LLC — it climbs DOM oddly and can pick the wrong company. Instead open /dashboard, click the header company-switcher button (currently-selected company name, e.g. 'Bright Beans Coffee Co.') then click the dropdown item 'button.w-full.text-left:has-text("231 LLC")'. Wait ~3.5s after switch for the greeting bubble to render (setTimeout 500ms + React commit). Verify bubble via closest('.ai-shimmer-bubble').
